metadata.title: Tier 1 plugin-code sub-rubric
metadata.description: Code-review rules calibrated for Claude Code plugin projects. Activates only when project-config.yaml declares project_kind: claude-code-plugin. Layer 2 (sub-rubric) of the four-layer rubric composition (base + sub + regime + project) per ADR-079 + ADR-088.

coverage.threshold_default_description: Plugin projects default to 80% line coverage. The threshold MAY be raised or lowered per-file or per-directory via a project-level allowlist override.

allowlist_schema.description: Per-path coverage threshold overrides. Each entry is a glob-style path pattern paired with an integer percentage 0-100. The reviewer applies the most-specific matching pattern; unmatched paths fall back to threshold_default_percent (80).

threshold_percent.description: Override coverage threshold for this path glob. Values >100 or <0 are rejected at config-validate time.

rationale.description: Optional human-readable justification recorded for review-time transparency.

plugins/*/skills/**/*.md.rationale: Markdown skill files have no executable coverage surface.

skill_md_token_budget.description: Per NFR-PLUGIN-2, every SKILL.md file in the plugin tree is held to a two-tier token budget. Warning fires when measured tokens exceed 1500 (a soft signal that the skill is drifting toward over-instruction). Critical fires when measured tokens reach 2000 (hard ceiling — the skill must be split or trimmed before merge).

severity_rules.pattern: Plugin file with executable code reports line coverage below 80% (after applying any plugin-code.coverage_allowlist overrides from project-config.yaml).
severity_rules.description: Plugin projects default to 80% line coverage. Files below the threshold without an explicit allowlist override block merge per FR-407. Use the plugin-code.coverage_allowlist key to grant per-path exemptions with a recorded rationale.
severity_rules.remediation: Either raise coverage on the offending paths to 80%, or — if the path is intentionally exempt — add an entry to plugin-code.coverage_allowlist with a threshold_percent and rationale.

severity_rules.pattern: Any SKILL.md file in the plugin tree measures more than 1500 tokens (soft ceiling). Approximate tokenizer: 4 chars per token.
severity_rules.description: Per NFR-PLUGIN-2, a SKILL.md exceeding 1500 tokens trips a WARNING signal. The skill is approaching the 2000-token hard ceiling; trim verbose narrative, extract reasoning into the skill's playbook, or split into focused sub-skills before further additions.
severity_rules.remediation: Move long-form rationale into the playbook, prune redundant bullet lists, or split the skill along its TDD / planning / lifecycle seams. Re-measure with the same 4-chars-per-token approximation.

severity_rules.pattern: Any SKILL.md file in the plugin tree measures 2000 tokens or more (hard ceiling). Approximate tokenizer: 4 chars per token.
severity_rules.description: Per NFR-PLUGIN-2, a SKILL.md at or above 2000 tokens MUST NOT merge. The skill exceeds the per-skill token budget that keeps Claude Code's planning context tractable. Split or trim the skill before re-running review.
severity_rules.remediation: Split the skill into smaller, focused skills (one workflow per skill) or extract long narrative into the playbook. Re-measure and confirm the total drops below 2000 tokens.
